title: Rhythm: full alphabet flow
text: the quick fox jumps over a lazy dog; my brave aunt and gentle uncle keep happy plants in the warm kitchen window today

tips.text: Pangram + extra prose = full keyboard test

tips.target: the quick fox jumps over a lazy dog; my brave aunt
and gentle uncle keep happy plants in the warm kitchen window today

character_tips.anna: Every letter in flow. Find a rhythm and don't break it.
character_tips.maxim: Full alphabet at 33 WPM = solid foundation. Keep building.
character_tips.knopych: FULL ALPHABET FLOW! 🌊 All keys in formation!
character_tips.klavochka: All your friends together, my dear 💕
